BUG-001.description: Suggested procedures rotation bug — procedures repeat rather than rotate across reports

BUG-002.description: Hardcoded risk tier labels — labels do not reflect dynamic risk scoring

BUG-003.description: PDF cell overflow — long text overflows table cells in generated PDFs

BUG-004.description: Orphaned ASC 250-10 references — appear in reports where not applicable

BUG-005.description: PP&E ampersand escaping — & renders as & in PDF output

BUG-006.description: Identical data quality scores — multiple reports return same score regardless of input

BUG-007.description: Empty drill-down stubs — drill-down sections render with no content

summary: Meridian tests: 2 passed, 0 failed. 0/7 known bugs confirmed open.
